text.message: Will trade brick if you need some😉
on me its only solo option
I mean at the very least its clear blue and I are 3 and 4
if red gets a 3:1 its trouble for sure
but yeah black's access to ore plus his early lead makes him a clear leader
I don't think its super close right now, but of course its medium early
game can change real quick right orange lol
red always had a good setup
like I said, he gets that 3:1 and its a big change
in all fairness you kept that 6 blocked instead of blocking your clear no.2
i didnt wanna have him knight me back straight away as he bought a dev
as you guys didnt have a knight it was the reason
still was probably worth not letting him be free for this long
he gets that 10 5 and its gg
red has like every number and ports
but he made a big mistake going for the wheat port instead of the 5 10
im still waiting for 3 roll, but none
